params._stablecoin: Stablecoin to settle in (USDC, USDT, etc.)

params.orderId: Unique ID from Enterprise system (e.g., Amazon Order ID hash)

settleOrder(bytes32).details: Triggers Trust Score reward for the buyer.If stableSettlementEnabled, converts VFIDE to stablecoin before sending to merchant

configureStableSettlement(address,addres.notice: Configure stablecoin settlement for merchants who need stable revenue

createOrder(bytes32,uint256,string).notice: User creates an order. Funds are locked in this contract.

rescueFunds(address,uint256,address).notice: Emergency rescue for stuck tokens or blacklisted merchant wallet.

settleOrder(bytes32).notice: Oracle (Amazon) confirms delivery/fulfillment. Funds released to Merchant.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256,address[] memory) view external returns (uint256[] memory)

documentation.text:
@notice Internal: Swap VFIDE to stablecoin via DEX
 @dev Uses simple swap interface - can be adapted for different DEXes
@notice Emergency rescue for stuck tokens or blacklisted merchant wallet.
